objective: Set up API integration and build foundation for observing Norse world simulator

steps.description: Set up project structure and install dependencies (requests, numpy, pandas, python-dotenv)
steps.expectedOutput: Project folder with requirements.txt and .env.example file created

steps.description: Create API client class with authentication setup (Google OAuth token handling)
steps.expectedOutput: api_client.py with authenticated client ready for requests

steps.description: Create data structures and parsing functions for simulator responses
steps.expectedOutput: data_parser.py with functions to parse viewport and convert to numpy arrays

steps.description: Implement query budget tracker and logging system
steps.expectedOutput: query_tracker.py that logs all queries, coordinates, and remaining budget

steps.description: Test API connection with single exploratory query on one seed
steps.expectedOutput: Successfully query simulator and print viewport data to verify API works

steps.description: Create observation strategy planner (gridding, sampling, query optimization)
steps.expectedOutput: strategy.py with functions to plan viewport coverage and manage query budget
